title: Bridge Essay: Mindfulness-induced endogenous theta stimulation occasions self-transcendence an

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — dissolution of self, ego, DMN decoupling, non-self in neuroscience.

**Mindfulness-induced endogenous theta stimulation occasions self-transcendence and inhibits addictive behavior.**. Science advances.. PMID: 36223472. DOI: 10.1126/sciadv.abo4455. Self-regulation is instantiated by theta oscillations (4 to 8 Hz) in neurons of frontal midline brain regions. Frontal midline theta (FMΘ) is inversely associated with default mode network (DMN) activation, which subserves self-referential processing. Addiction involves impaired self-regulation and DMN dysfunction.
